note: v314: Reconnect now actually fixes a broken bank link. Before, it only re-authenticated the login (Plaid update mode), which does nothing for a stale data feed — e.g. a transaction that settled but stays stuck 'pending'. Reconnect now first forces Plaid to re-sync from your bank in place (new /plaid/refresh → /transactions/refresh), and only opens the sign-in flow when the bank genuinely needs re-authentication. The item id is kept either way, so no lost reconciliation history and no need to disconnect/re-add.
